3305640.name: Echoes of Madness - The Hawthorne Case
3305640.description:
Echoes of Madness is a short visual novel set in a Lovecraftian world. You follow the story of a detective trying to find the daughter of a wealthy client.
This is a small project, as I’m still learning game development, and I wanted to share one of my first creations with you.

  • Pixel art style graphics

  • Atmospheric music and sound effects

  • A short but intense noir-style narrative

Thank you for playing, and I hope you enjoy the experience!
